center.name: Sri Lanka woodshrike
center.summary: Sri Lanka woodshrike是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Common woodshrike，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The form found in Sri Lanka which was treated as a subspecies is now usually considered a separate species, the Sri Lanka woodshrike

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The form found in Sri Lanka which was treated as a subspecies is now usually considered a separate species, the Sri Lanka woodshrike
